summary: Strong code quality: `Set-StrictMode`, proper error handling, `LiteralPath` usage, pinned action refs, least-privilege permissions all present. YAML syntax is sound. Critical incompleteness: workflow (line 18) references `SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1` and config `fixtures/secrets.json` (line 13, run-act-tests lines 23–32 enumerate case-*.json fixtures), none provided. Dead code block SecretRotationValidator.ps1:65–70 serves no purpose (guard for dot-sourcing that does nothing). Workflow cannot execute without missing fixtures; run-act-tests harness depends on test case files that don't exist. Architecture is maintainable if completed, but incomplete deliverable.
